hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *package-lock.json|*/dist/*|*/test-fixtures/*) echo "Blocked: $f is generated/locked output. Regenerate via npm scripts (e.g. generate:fixtures) instead of editing by hand." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/biome" check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
